declarations.description: JB Design System form coordinator web component that collects named child values, validates child controls, tracks dirty state, supports virtual elements and nested jb-form instances, and dispatches submit/dirty/validity events.
declarations.name: JBFormWebComponent

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name used when this form is nested inside another jb-form.

members.name: value
members.description: Aggregated object of named child form values. Setting it calls setFormValues.

members.name: name
members.description: Name attribute value used by parent jb-form traversal.

members.name: isDirty
members.description: True when any named child form element, virtual element, or sub-form is dirty.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper for aggregate form validation.

members.name: validElements
members.description: Connected native and custom form controls registered directly under this jb-form.

members.name: virtualElements
members.description: Virtual element registry with list, dictionary, add(config), and remove({ virtualElement }).

type.text: { list: ReadonlyArray<VirtualElement<any, any>>; dictionary: Readonly<Record<string, VirtualElement<any, any>>>; add: Function; remove: Function }

members.name: subForms
members.description: Nested jb-form registry with list and dictionary.

type.text: { list: readonly JBFormWebComponent[]; dictionary: Readonly<Record<string, JBFormWebComponent | JBFormWebComponent[]>> }

members.name: formElements
members.description: Internal native/custom child form element registry.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs synchronous aggregate validation without showing errors.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs synchronous aggregate validation and asks child controls, virtual elements, and sub-forms to show errors.

methods.name: jbCheckValidity
methods.description: Runs rich async validation for jb-validation-compatible child controls, virtual elements, and sub-forms.

methods.name: getValidationMessages
methods.description: Returns validation messages for named child controls, virtual elements, and sub-forms.

methods.name: getValidationSummary
methods.description: Returns validation summaries for named jb-validation-compatible controls, virtual elements, and sub-forms.

methods.name: getValidationResult
methods.description: Returns full validation results for named jb-validation-compatible controls, virtual elements, and sub-forms.

methods.name: getFormValues
methods.description: Returns all named child values. Repeated names are returned as TraverseCollection.

methods.name: getFormDirtyStatus
methods.description: Returns dirty status for named child controls, virtual elements, and sub-forms.

methods.name: setFormValues
methods.description: Sets values on named child controls, virtual elements, and sub-forms. Updates initial values by default.

methods.name: setFormInitialValues
methods.description: Sets initial values used for dirty checks. Updates current values by default.

events.name: submit
events.description: Dispatched after a trusted child submit is intercepted and reportValidity returns true.

events.name: dirty-change
events.description: Dispatched when aggregate dirty state changes. event.detail.isDirty contains the new boolean.

events.name: validity-change
events.description: Dispatched when aggregate synchronous validity changes. event.detail.isValid contains the new boolean.

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched by the form when a virtual element changes. Child controls may also bubble their own change events through jb-form.

events.name: form-change
events.description: Dispatched from child controls when setFormValues changes a child value programmatically.

events.name: init
events.description: Dispatched from connectedCallback after child element scanning starts.

slots.description: Form controls, native controls, nested jb-form elements, buttons, and layout content.
